title: Communauté de communes de l'Yerres à l'Ancœur
summary: The Communauté de communes de l'Yerres à l'Ancœur is a former communauté de communes in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was created in November 2005. It was dissolved in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes de l'Yerres à l'Ancœur is a former communauté de communes in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was created in November 2005. It was dissolved in January 2017.

Composition
The Communauté de communes comprised the following communes:
